summary: Address the listed production-readiness gaps before launch.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: No protected route middleware found
findings.why_it_matters: Next.js apps commonly need server-side route protection beyond client state.
findings.remediation: Add middleware or an equivalent server-side protected route pattern.

findings.title: No Supabase/Postgres migrations directory found
findings.why_it_matters: Production schema changes need reviewable migration history.
findings.remediation: Add migrations under supabase/migrations or an equivalent tracked migration folder.

findings.title: Stripe event handling lacks idempotency evidence
findings.why_it_matters: Stripe may retry events, causing duplicate grants or updates.
findings.remediation: Store processed event IDs or use idempotent writes.

findings.title: No CI workflow found
findings.why_it_matters: Critical flows need automated checks before launch.
findings.remediation: Add a GitHub Actions workflow for tests and linting.

findings.title: No tests found
findings.why_it_matters: Payment and auth regressions are easy to ship without tests.
findings.remediation: Add focused tests for auth, payments, and core flows.

findings.title: No .env.example file found
findings.why_it_matters: Teams need a safe env contract without secret values.

findings.title: Privacy policy or terms page is missing
findings.why_it_matters: Apps collecting user or payment data need clear trust and legal surfaces.
findings.remediation: Add privacy and terms pages linked from the app.

findings.title: Public read policy on products
findings.evidence: create policy Allow public read-only access. on products for select using (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public read access on products may be intentional for catalog or content display.
findings.remediation: Verify the table contains only intentionally public data.

findings.title: Public read policy on prices
findings.evidence: create policy Allow public read-only access. on prices for select using (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public read access on prices may be intentional for catalog or content display.
findings.remediation: Verify the table contains only intentionally public data.

findings.title: Stripe price ID is hard-coded
findings.why_it_matters: Hard-coded price IDs make environment separation fragile.
findings.remediation: Read price IDs from environment config.

findings.title: Stripe price ID is hard-coded
findings.why_it_matters: Hard-coded price IDs make environment separation fragile.
findings.remediation: Read price IDs from environment config.

findings.title: No Next.js error boundary evidence found
findings.why_it_matters: User-facing failures should render controlled recovery UI.
findings.remediation: Add app/error.tsx or an ErrorBoundary component.

findings.title: No logging or error tracking evidence found
findings.remediation: Add structured logging or error tracking.

findings.title: No contact or support path found
findings.why_it_matters: Users need a clear support route before trusting a SaaS product.
findings.remediation: Add support email or contact page.

findings.title: Placeholder copy found
findings.remediation: Replace placeholders with specific product copy.

findings.title: Placeholder copy found
findings.remediation: Replace placeholders with specific product copy.
